ANSWER: Working on cars represents a passion, a form of therapy and relaxation, and a source of accomplishment, fulfillment, and purpose for Dave. - "Collaborating with others and learning from them keeps me motivated. Surrounding myself with positive energy and passion helps as well." (Calvin, 6:38 pm on 21 July, 2023)
- "It's exciting to get positive feedback and it gives me strength to keep going and reach more people." (Calvin, 10:56 am on 13 September, 2023)
- "I usually watch music videos, concerts, and documentaries about artists and their creative process... Plus, it's a source of inspiration for me." (Calvin, 5:46 pm on 2 November, 2023)

- "The producer gave me some advice to stay true to myself and sound unique... It's really motivating!" (Calvin, 4:15 pm on 20 April, 2023)
- "Creating something that people connect with and brings joy is what I'm all about. Moments like this really motivate me to keep growing!" (Calvin, 5:46 pm on 2 November, 2023)
- "When setbacks come my way, I remind myself why I'm passionate about my goals. I rely on helpful people around me and take a break to recharge with my favorite activities. That always helps me get back to feeling motivated." (Calvin, 9:39 am on 15 October, 2023)
- "Staying connected and up-to-date on world events is important to me... Plus, it keeps me motivated and inspired." (Calvin, 2:17 pm on 23 October, 2023)
- "Seeing everyone get behind it has been awesome... It's also cool that it's connecting with people. It really motivates me to make even better music." (Calvin, 10:56 am on 13 September, 2023)
- "finding the right balance between sticking to my sound and trying new stuff. It can be intimidating, but that's what makes it so exciting and keeps me motivated to keep going!" (Calvin, 6:38 pm on 21 July, 2023)
- "when we remember why we're doing it, it keeps us going." (Calvin, 6:24 pm on 1 May, 2023)
- "I got it from another artist as a gift - it's a great reminder of why I keep hustling as a musician!" (Calvin, 6:24 pm on 1 May, 2023)
- "This guitar means so much to me; it's a reminder of my passion for music and the amazing friendships I've made." (Calvin, 2:55 pm on 31 August, 2023)
- "my car is the best and I'm pretty proud of this... it reminds me of my hard work and dedication. It really inspires me." (Calvin, 1:12 pm on 3 August, 2023)
- "It's awesome to see our growth and progress." (Calvin, 2:44 pm on 4 October, 2023)
- "Feels good when our hard work pays off." (Calvin, 6:24 pm on 1 May, 2023)
- "I've been supporting some young musicians from a music program. Supporting their passion is amazing and their enthusiasm is inspiring." (Calvin, 9:15 pm on 13 November, 2023)
